subject: Project pulse: falcon execution in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-5089
body: Following yesterday's call, the falcon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso. Reference initiative INIT-5089. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
